'''hopathaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:nicked|nicked]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-p-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:nicked|nicked]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| hopathaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:hopathithi|hopathithi]] || [[word:hopathiji|hopathiji]] || [[word:hopathishi|hopathishi]] || [[word:hopathiki|hopathiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:hopathuthuthu|hopathuthuthu]] || [[word:hopathujuju|hopathujuju]] || [[word:hopathushushu|hopathushushu]] || [[word:hopathukuku|hopathukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:hopathuthu|hopathuthu]] || [[word:hopathuju|hopathuju]] || [[word:hopathushu|hopathushu]] || [[word:hopathuku|hopathuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:hopathufthuf|hopathufthuf]] || [[word:hopathufjuf|hopathufjuf]] || [[word:hopathufshuf|hopathufshuf]] || [[word:hopathufkuf|hopathufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:hopathethe|hopathethe]] || [[word:hopatheje|hopatheje]] || [[word:hopatheshe|hopatheshe]] || [[word:hopatheke|hopatheke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:hopathothotho|hopathothotho]] || [[word:hopathojojo|hopathojojo]] || [[word:hopathoshosho|hopathoshosho]] || [[word:hopathokoko|hopathokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:hopathotho|hopathotho]] || [[word:hopathojo|hopathojo]] || [[word:hopathosho|hopathosho]] || [[word:hopathoko|hopathoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:hopathofthof|hopathofthof]] || [[word:hopathofjof|hopathofjof]] || [[word:hopathofshof|hopathofshof]] || [[word:hopathofkof|hopathofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:hopathĂŻfthĂŻf|hopathĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:hopathĂŻfjĂŻf|hopathĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:hopathĂŻfshĂŻf|hopathĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:hopathĂŻfkĂŻf|hopathĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:hopathĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|hopathĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:hopathĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|hopathĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:hopathĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|hopathĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:hopathĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|hopathĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:hopathĂŻfthĂŻf|hopathĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:hopathĂŻfjĂŻf|hopathĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:hopathĂŻfshĂŻf|hopathĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:hopathĂŻfkĂŻf|hopathĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:hopathĂŻfthĂŻf|hopathĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:hopathĂŻfjĂŻf|hopathĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:hopathĂŻfshĂŻf|hopathĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:hopathĂŻfkĂŻf|hopathĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:hopathĂŠthĂŠ|hopathĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:hopathĂŠjĂŠ|hopathĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:hopathĂŠshĂŠ|hopathĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:hopathĂŠkĂŠ|hopathĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:hopathathatha|hopathathatha]] || [[word:hopathajaja|hopathajaja]] || [[word:hopathashasha|hopathashasha]] || [[word:hopathakaka|hopathakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:hopathatha|hopathatha]] || [[word:hopathaja|hopathaja]] || [[word:hopathasha|hopathasha]] || [[word:hopathaka|hopathaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:hopathafthaf|hopathafthaf]] || [[word:hopathafjaf|hopathafjaf]] || [[word:hopathafshaf|hopathafshaf]] || [[word:hopathafkaf|hopathafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:hopathasha|hopathasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:hopathshĂ«sha|hopathshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:hopathrosha|hopathrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:hopathmusha|hopathmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:hopathyasha|hopathyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gohopathnkshĂ«sha|gohopathnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gohopathnkrosha|gohopathnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gohopathnkmusha|gohopathnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gohopathnkyasha|gohopathnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:hopapathasha|hopapathasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:hopapathshĂ«sha|hopapathshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:hopapathrosha|hopapathrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:hopapathmusha|hopapathmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:hopapathyasha|hopapathyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gohopapathnkshĂ«sha|gohopapathnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gohopapathnkrosha|gohopapathnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gohopapathnkmusha|gohopapathnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gohopapathnkyasha|gohopapathnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:hepĂŠthasha|hepĂŠthasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:hepĂŠthshĂ«sha|hepĂŠthshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:hepĂŠthrosha|hepĂŠthrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:hepĂŠthmusha|hepĂŠthmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:hepĂŠthyasha|hepĂŠthyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gohepĂŠthnkshĂ«sha|gohepĂŠthnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gohepĂŠthnkrosha|gohepĂŠthnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gohepĂŠthnkmusha|gohepĂŠthnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gohepĂŠthnkyasha|gohepĂŠthnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:hopfathasha|hopfathasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:hopfathshĂ«sha|hopfathshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:hopfathrosha|hopfathrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:hopfathmusha|hopfathmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:hopfathyasha|hopfathyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gohopfathnkshĂ«sha|gohopfathnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gohopfathnkrosha|gohopfathnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gohopfathnkmusha|gohopfathnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gohopfathnkyasha|gohopfathnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|718161e}}
